title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Aramex India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
